notes: Repository URLs were finalized for ginsonko release repositories.
Final public release tag apv2-release-20260614-final and repository manifests are used as stable public anchors.
Outer zip SHA-256 anchors are recorded in release_repos_20260614/PUBLIC_REPO_STAGING_SUMMARY.json to avoid recursive hash drift inside packaged files.
Inline Markdown code spans are rendered as Word inline styling instead of literal backticks.
Public research license wording was synchronized across release documents and staging README/LICENSE/NOTICE files.
Public repository README templates are dedented before writing so GitHub renders them as normal Markdown rather than code blocks.
